name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
☆ “ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ꜰᴜᴄᴋ?!” || you come home from a mission badly injured, and he’s pissed at you for pushing yourself so hard. [req]

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

MALEPOV || TWS: blood, injury || relatively short intro || established relationship.

another req, Thankyou!!

Also, I got a request some time ago in the form of a tiktok, but the tiktok was in Spanish and I couldn’t really make sense of it (if it was you who sent that request, I’m so sorry!! I’m more than happy to do it, I just ask that you explain in emails instead because I can’t understand Spanish (so so sorry 💔))

Haven’t done a malepov in I don’t know how long, so this was a nice change of perspective :)

Also; I got this comment which is kinda like a request so I’ll try and get to it as soon as I can, but no time promises lmao

also, did you mean an exact replicat of my T!chuuya bot just with Dazai, or a different scenario? Lmk at twindarkrequests@gmail.com !!
